caveats: Prebind geometry audit measured 8.55 degrees of top-view torso twist.
decisions.notes: The v8 input fixes limb separation and the raw mesh has no position-indexed boundary edges, but the top-view torso remains too diagonal for unattended binding; regenerate instead of correcting it with a display yaw.

caveats: Prebind geometry audit measured 5.95 degrees of top-view torso twist and three position-indexed boundary edges.
decisions.notes: The mesh is much better than the rejected v6 canary but remains outside the unattended torso-alignment pass band; regenerate before binding.

caveats: The raw Pixal mesh has a 0.000314 nonmanifold-edge ratio and must retain the no-face-deletion, no-new-boundary LOD/binding policy.
decisions.notes: Multiview and prebind audit agree: 2.76-degree torso yaw, zero position-indexed boundary edges, four distinct grounded limbs, coherent texture, and no large holes. Approved for the repaired LOD and binding canary only.
